name: Ber Ber Transport LLC
fmcsa_status: Active USDOT; NOT AUTHORIZED for interstate for-hire; no out-of-service orders; 0 inspections / 0 crashes (24mo)
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue / Manta / Facebook
notes: FMCSA match found as BERBER TRANSPORT LLC (USDOT 4416787). MCS-150 dated 05/29/2025 (very recent registration). Operation classification: passengers; 4 small school buses (1-8 pax) + 4 mid-size (9-15 pax). FMCSA physical address is 54 Washington St, West Orange NJ — close to but DIFFERENT from input address (7 Glenwood Ave, East Orange NJ 07017). Manta/Facebook list both East Orange and West Orange locations under 'BerBer Transport'/'Berber Transportation'. Likely same operator; small NEMT/student-van fleet. NJ business records require direct NJ DOR portal lookup for inc_date and registered agent; per third-party data the entity was established circa 2024-2025 based on MCS-150 timing.
